extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each party: I counted only the against rows, namely criminal proceedings of 4 against the Company plus 1 against Directors, statutory/regulatory proceedings of 6 against the Company, and tax proceedings of 36 against the Company plus 1 against Subsidiaries; all By rows and promoter personal matters were excluded. The aggregate quantified amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is the stated table amount of ₹1,250.97 million plus ₹0.30 million, or ₹1,251.27 million = ₹125.127 crore; the source contingent-liabilities table is in ₹ million and its latest stated total as at September 30, 2023 is ₹902.20 million = ₹90.22 crore, using the disclosed line items because no Total row is shown. The concentration disclosures are for top five owned hotels, not top five customers, and therefore company-wide customer concentration percentages are not disclosed; the hotel concentration uses Fiscal 2023 total income and is not used for the customer fields. Monetary tables use ₹ million; conversion to crore is by dividing by 10 because ₹10 million equals ₹1 crore.
